name: White Chocolate Ricotta-Filled Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Finely minced orange peel (from an orange skin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the hazelnuts and chocolate; mix well.
3. Generously grease 2 heavy-gauge baking sheets with butter.
4. Arrange 9 to 12 Sue gow skins on each baking sheet, leaving approximately 3/4-inch between each skin.
5. Sprinkle about 2 1/2 teaspoons of the hazelnut-chocolate mixture on each skin.
6. Bake for 9 or 10 minutes, rotating the pans from bottom to top and back to front, until the skins are light golden brown on the edges (the chocolate will not melt).
7. Remove from oven and cool skins on baking racks.
8. Prepare the remaining skins the same way and bake until done. Cool to room temperature.
9. In a medium bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, white chocolate, sugar, and orange peel; mix well.
10. Using approximately 1 tablespoon per cookie, center the ricotta mixture on the nut-chocolate side of the skins.
11. Top each with remaining skins, nut-chocolate side up.
12. Serve on a large platter garnished with mint sprigs or curled orange zest.
